name: worlds
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.worlds.every(w => typeof w.worldId === 'string' && Array.isArray(w.stages) && w.stageCount === w.stages.length)
_note: Returns the fixed canon-world expedition catalog (6 worlds, each an ordered stage list with objective + xp). A pure read of in-module WORLD_STAGES — no STATE, no DB, no actor dependency — so {} always returns ok:true (NEVER no_db).
